title: gaura drummondii
intro: Gaura drummondii, also known as Drummond's gaura, is a perennial wildflower native to North America that belongs to the four o'clock family (Onagraceae). The plant's leaves and flowers have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Gaura drummondii include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional folk remedies.
